EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the third attempt stage when the quote was for the Admiral scheme.
EmailTemplate.name: Opportunity (Admiral) – 3rd Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Did you miss something off your quote?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for getting an insurance quote from Kingsbridge.
Now you’ve reviewing your quotation documents, is there anything you missed?
Here are the types of coverage you can add to your policy:
- Hired in Plant cover - Covers you in the instance that plant equipment was damaged or stolen. - Own Plant cover - Covers you in the instance that plant equipment was damaged or stolen. - Contract Works - Covers you against accidental loss, destruction or damage for materials and labour that you've used caused by an unforeseen event in order to restore the project to its status prior to occurrence. - Professional Indemnity - Covers you against the cost of compensating a client for loss caused by negligent services or advice
If you need to make a change to your quote, reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively, you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
